creator: mx5arbc@hotmail.com
text:
I saw in a comment on german thread that Version 11 STABLE may have fixed this problem but not the RELEASE version.   I don't get to choose what NAS4FREE uses as baseline O/S however.   I have reported this problem on NAS4FREE site already and others have confirmed that this problem is consistent, not only if using HYPER-V virtualization but also in VMWARE ESX now.   No fix is prevalent on their latest versions.   I've tried several versions now over 4-5 months and no success yet.  They must still be using RELEASE base.     

All versions of 10.3.xxxx are still working however so have using that for now.
